narrative: I am noticing a Neo4j authentication rate limit error blocking knowledge graph operations despite healthy system status. My agents lack versioned prompts for desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, and reasoning_methods, creating operational vulnerability. The short 92-second uptime suggests these issues emerged during initial agent initialization. Persistent memory systems are functional but cannot fully leverage Mem0's relational data due to the authentication failure. I will prioritize diagnosing and fixing the Neo4j credentials within the self-improvement loop.
